title: Clayr Airsip Moisture Absorbers for Home - 1000ml Refillable Dehumidifier with 2x 450g Refill Tabs - Eliminates Damp, Mould & Musty Smells - Non Electric Dehumidifier for Bathroom, Home, Window
features: EASY MOISTURE CONTROL: Clayr Airsip non electric dehumidifier includes 2x 450g moisture tabs. Simply insert and let it quietly draw in excess humidity to help manage damp and condensation at home.
DESIGNED TO REDUCE DAMP: The vented body allows steady air circulation, helping capture moisture effectively. Ideal for use in bathrooms, kitchens or near windows where humidity builds up most.

SILENT, POWER-FREE OPERATION: Runs quietly with no plugs or batteries. This refillable dehumidifier for home fits perfectly in bedrooms, cupboards or kitchens, providing discreet and continuous moisture control.

EASY, CLEAN EMPTYING: Built with a handy pour spout and anti-spill silicone cap to make emptying neat and simple. The frosted tank with water level markers helps you know when it’s time to drain collected moisture.
COMPLETE SET READY TO USE: Includes 1x Clayr Airsip Refillable Dehumidifier (1000ml capacity) and 2x Clayr Tabs (450g).
REFILL TABS AVAILABLE: Keep your Airsip ready for continued use with Clayr Refill Tabs (SKU: RD1301), available separately for easy, long-term moisture control.
description: Product Description Simple to use. Insert the tablet, place Airsip, and let it quietly absorb moisture with no hassle or power needed. Water indicator. Easy read 500 ml and 1000 ml indicators show exactly how much moisture Airsip has collected - no guesswork. Built for easy maintenance. Anti-spill silicone cap and spout make emptying water quick, clean, and mess-free. Effective moisture absorption. Dynamic vents pull moisture from every angle to reduce damp, mould, and condensation. Clayr Airsip Dehumidifier Refill Tabs Merchant video How does using Airsip improve air quality? By reducing excess moisture, Airsip helps prevent mould and mildew growth, which can cause musty smells and worsen indoor air quality making your home fresher and healthier. Is Airsip safe to use around children and pets? Yes, it’s safe, but keep tablets out of reach as they contain active crystals. Where can I use Airsip? It’s perfect for bedrooms, wardrobes, cupboards, bathrooms, and other small damp-prone spaces. Do I need to plug it in or use batteries? No, Airsip works completely without power—no plugs or batteries required. How often do I need to replace the tablets? And where can I get extra refills? Each tablet lasts approximately 8–10 weeks when used in a moderately humid 20m² room. We also offer refill tablets, which are sold separately—just search for RD1301.
